scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:client" "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:sites"
scripts.electron: npm run build --prefix client && npm start --prefix electron
scripts.electron:local: npm run build --prefix client && LOCAL_DEV=true npm start --prefix electron
scripts.electron:prod: npm run build:prod --prefix client && npm start --prefix electron
scripts.electron:dist: npm run build:prod --prefix client && npm run dist --prefix electron
scripts.electron:dist:win: npm run build:prod --prefix client && npm run dist:win --prefix electron
scripts.electron:dist:mac: npm run build:prod --prefix client && npm run dist:mac --prefix electron
scripts.electron:dist:linux: npm run build:prod --prefix client && npm run dist:linux --prefix electron
scripts.electron:ship: npm run build:prod --prefix client && npm run ship --prefix electron
